name: Cincinnati Skyline Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ground beef and water until soupy.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the pot.
3. Simmer, uncovered for 3 hours, stirring occasionally.
Makes 8 servings.
Note: Top with grated Cheddar, onions, chili beans or use as sauce over noodles or spaghetti.
